title: Ranbhoomi/Season 1
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Ranbhoomi Season 1}} {{Upthrust Esports Navbox}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=3 |name=Ranbhoomi Season 1 |icon=Ranbhoomi S1 icon.png |tickername=Ranbhoomi S1 |shortname=Ranbhoomi S1 |image=Ranbhoomi S1.png |type=Online |team_number=18 |series=Ranbhoomi |organizer=Upthrust Esports |organizer-link=http://instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ |sponsor=[https://loco.gg/ LOCO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=10,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-10-21 |edate=2021-10-27 |twitter= |instagram=upthrust_esports |web= |linkedin=company/upthrust-esports |loco=streamers/upthrustesports |discord=zZQMMPeEj7 |facebook= |youtube=c/UPTHRUSTESPORTS |next=Ranbhoomi/Season 2{{!}}Season 2 }} '''''[http://instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ Upthrust Esports]''''' in association with '''''[https://loco.gg/ LOCO]''''' present the first season of BGMI tournament ''Rangbhoomi'' for called the '''''Rangbhoomi Season 1''''' with a prize pool of ₹10,00,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=RA1|b1flag=in |b1name= |b2=Gamezo Tech|b2flag=in |b2name= |b3=NekRoz|b3flag=in|b3name=Sneherdra Srimany }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Ranbhoomi Season 1:''' 7th October 2021 to 26th October 2021.'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]] '''''Qualifier 1:''' 7th October 2021.'' * ''A total of 1000 teams will compete in the first qualifier'' * ''Teams will be divided into a total of 50 groups (20 teams per group).'' * ''Each group/team will get to play a single match'' * ''Top 2 teams from each group will advance to the second qualifier'' * ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''100 teams '''}} will advance to Qualifier 2''. '''''Qualifier 2:''' 8th October 2021 to 9th October 2021.'' * ''A total of 100 teams will compete in the second qualifier'' * ''Teams will be divided into a total of 5 groups (20 teams per group).'' * ''Each group/team will get to play two matches'' * ''Top 8 teams from each group will advance to the Group Stages'' * ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''40 teams '''}} will advance to the Group Stages''. '''''Group Stage:''' 10th October 2021.'' * ''A total of 40 teams will compete in the second qualifier'' * ''Teams will be divided into a total of 2 groups (20 teams per group).'' * ''Each group/team will get to play three matches'' * ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''Top 7 teams'''}} from the overall standings will advance to the Semi-Finals''. '''''Semi-Finals:''' 13th October 2021 to 20th October 2021.'' * ''A total of 27 teams (7 Qualified + 20 Invited) will compete in the Semi-Finals'' * ''Teams will play a total of divided into 3 groups A, B & C.'' * ''28 Matches to be played in total (4 Matches each day)'' * ''Each team will play a total of 20 matches'' * ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''Top 18 teams '''}} from the overall standings will advance to Grand Finals''. '''''Grand Finals:''' 21st October 2021 to 26th October 2021.'' * ''A total of 18 qualified will compete in the Grand Finals.'' * ''Teams will play a compete for a period of 6 days.'' * ''30 Matches to be played in total'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Kill Points''''' ||''1 per kill'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-18}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ₹10,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $13313 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
